CustomField.description: Use for filter MIR dashboards. Filter by owner manager. MIS-3359
CustomField.formula:
CASE( Owner.Manager.FirstName ,
"Rachel",DATE(2021,4,4) , "Omri", DATE (2021,5,5), "Ryan", DATE(2021, 9, 9), "Kyle", DATE(2021, 8, 8), "Hadas", DATE(2021, 11, 11), "Manuela", DATE(2021, 12, 12), "Matt", DATE(2022, 1, 1), "Shannon", DATE(2022, 2, 2), "Joshua", DATE(2022,3,3), "Shoshana", DATE(2022,4,4), "Christofer", DATE(2022,5,5), "Ohad", DATE(2023,1,1), "Ido", DATE(2023,2,2), "Eitan", DATE(2023,3,3), "Soichi", DATE(2023,4,4), "Gavin", DATE(2023,5,5), "Brian", DATE(2023,6,6), "Naoya", DATE (2023,7,7),
DATE(2020,1,1) )
CustomField.label: SDR/MIR Team Leader
